old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.39.2","title":"Harden secure CoAP resources","description":"Make /config writes default-deny with explicit opt-in, strictly validate SOS CBOR/from/t fields before mutation, and cap sent-message records plus dynamically mounted detail resources.","acceptance_criteria":"Default config PUT is unauthorized and non-mutating; explicit opt-in allows valid writes; malformed SOS maps/identifiers/timestamps reject without activation; sent history and detail routes retain only the configured newest entries; focused tests, Ruff, mypy, and three reviews pass.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-19T02:39:59.496728Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-19T02:39:59.496728Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.39.2","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.39","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-19T02:39:59.626366Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}

new_value: Secure CoAP mutation resources now default deny, validate atomically, and retain bounded state.
